_comment: Goal-Allocator config. 5 risk tiers, all growth-and-above (no internal bond/cash ballast; your treasury bills + EFP are the external ballast). UNIVERSE = Irish-domiciled, USD-denominated, ACCUMULATING UCITS ETFs (LSE '.L' lines) for a Malaysia-resident: 15% dividend withholding (vs 30% US-listed) and no US estate-tax exposure. No leveraged/crypto (no clean UCITS equivalent) by design choice. Access via Interactive Brokers. 'policy_weight' = target share of the pool per tier (sum=1.0). Within a tier, candidates are inverse-vol weighted and each position is vol-sized toward 'target_vol'. The robo never PREDICTS which candidate wins; it weights + rebalances a basket you approve.

goal.name: Primary growth goal
goal._comment: PLACEHOLDERS — edit to your real numbers. All amounts are in base_currency (MYR), the currency you fund in and measure the goal in. Assets are USD-denominated; the projector converts via the USD/MYR model below.

projection._comment: Drift is an ASSUMPTION (the short bull-biased sample's own mean is not trustworthy); volatility comes from the data. fx_drift_annual=0.0 = no view on the ringgit. Reported as a conservative/base/optimistic spread.

rebalance._comment: Rebalance every ~quarter (63 trading days) OR when any tier drifts >25% relative from its policy weight, whichever triggers first. New contributions are deployed to underweight tiers (free rebalancing).

data._comment: Daily adjusted-close. train_frac fixes target_vol from the train split only (no leakage).

vol_overlay._comment: Per-position weight w = clip(target_vol / forecast_vol, 0, vol_cap). vol_cap=1.0 = long-only, no leverage. forecast_vol is EWMA realized vol shifted 1 day (no look-ahead).

benchmark._comment: Static buy-and-hold benchmark (UCITS S&P 500, same universe/currency as the holdings). Success = comparable Sharpe with shallower drawdown + on-track goal probability.
